creator: servantium.com

evidence.text: Title: Building an Institutional Memory Engine URL Source: https://servantium.com/blog/building-an-institutional-memory-engine/ Published Time: 2026-05-10 Markdown Content: Retrospective lessons learned are dead. Not because retros don’t happen. Some firms still hold them religiously. They’re dead because the people who lived the lesson are usually gone before the project that needs the lesson lands. The senior consultant who learned that the integration scope always doubles when the customer’s data team isn’t in the kickoff? She’s at a different firm. The PM who learned that fixed-fee multi-phase deals always overrun their middle phase?
